name: Spotify Technology S.A.
one_liner: The world's most popular audio streaming subscription service, offering music, podcasts, and audiobooks to over 700 million monthly active users globally.

ambiguities: Spotify is legally incorporated in Luxembourg (Spotify Technology S.A.) but operationally headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden; Stockholm used as HQ.
Total pre-IPO funding raised (~$3.1B per LeadIQ) is a third-party estimate; Spotify went public via direct listing in April 2018 and did not raise IPO proceeds.
Headcount of 7,323 full-time employees is from SEC 6-K filing for Q3 2025 (end of Q3); Revelio Labs estimates a broader workforce of ~16,000 including contractors/part-time.
Tech stack sourced from third-party tools (LeadIQ); not directly confirmed by Spotify engineering blog in these searches.
growth_12mo_pct for headcount not calculable due to restructuring-driven fluctuations.
